pullRequest.title: [DOM-55256] Adding extra validation for audit reports

nodes.body: @ddl-amodi This endpoint was not doing any validation I have added the same validations that used in permission changes reports
Should we use "canRetrieveProject" here? Why should the authorization rules usually applied to projects be cirumvented here?
we are doing the canRetrieveProject check on some lines below, do you mean removing this check and just keeping the canRetrieveProject?
nw, i didn't see that it was used. lgtm
Would it make more sense to use the projectauthorizer instead of adding this method?

we are using "projectauthorizer" but through the adapter to avoid the direct dependency with the projects module, I thought that was the way of using it if there is a better way please let me know and I can replace it

You can feel free to use the projectAuthorizer directly. I think the develop team would prefer that you call the project service in order to get the project information, since that includes authorization. I realize that this code has already been here for a while and refactoring it may take some time. If you need more data to be exposed on the projects info returned from the project service, I think it would be reasonable to add it.
